A1_hint_success_rate.description: % of hint-using attempts that result in correct answer

A2_same_concept_retest_accuracy.description: % correct on re-attempt after prior wrong on same concept
A2_same_concept_retest_accuracy.proxy_note: Computed from consecutive attempts sharing concept_ids

A3_remediation_success_rate.description: % of remediation-triggered concepts that reach APPROACHING within 10 attempts

A4_error_classification_coverage.description: % of wrong attempts that receive a non-null error_type

A5_mastery_progress_signal.description: % of students with at least one concept progressing from UNBUILT to DEVELOPING+

B1_teacher_report_blocking_accuracy.description: Do teacher reports correctly identify the top blocking concepts?
B1_teacher_report_blocking_accuracy.proxy_note: Validated by test assertions on report output structure

B2_parent_report_actionability.description: Does parent report provide clear next-step recommendations?
B2_parent_report_actionability.proxy_note: Validated by presence of mastery_tips and next_steps in output

B3_hint_effectiveness_summary_readabilit.description: Can teachers understand which hint levels work and which students are stuck?
B3_hint_effectiveness_summary_readabilit.proxy_note: Will be added in hint effectiveness Round 3

C2_hint_usage_rate.description: % of attempts that use at least one hint

C3_repeated_failure_rate.description: % of students hitting 3+ consecutive wrong on same concept

C4_stuck_after_hint_rate.description: % of hint-using attempts where student still gets wrong answer

D1_pytest_pass_rate.description: pytest tests/ pass count and fail count

D4_pre_existing_failures.description: Count of tests in deselect list

D5_integration_coverage.description: Count of Phase 1-5 learning modules wired into live flow
